_comment: ATS boards to poll. provider is greenhouse|lever|ashby; slug is the company's board token in its careers URL (boards.greenhouse.io/<slug>, jobs.lever.co/<slug>, jobs.ashbyhq.com/<slug>). The entries below are VERIFIED-live as of authoring, but they are LARGE companies chosen to prove the pipeline runs end-to-end. Big public companies already have in-house recruiting, so they are NOT real recruiter leads. For actual leads, replace/augment with SMB boards (smaller companies hiring heavily). Grow this list; board discovery is a later enhancement.
